nodes.name: semaglutide
nodes.context: Semaglutide is formulated as oral tablets containing 300 mg SNAC with 3 mg, 7 mg, or 14 mg semaglutide... This oral formulation is marketed as Rybelsus.

nodes.name: SNAC
nodes.context: SNAC chemical identifier: sodium 8-[(2-hydroxybenzoyl)amino]octanoate (InChIKey: UOENJXXSKABLJL-UHFFFAOYSA-M)... SNAC is also known as salcaprozate sodium.

nodes.name: octanoic acid
nodes.context: The related caprylic acid backbone has the identifier WWZKQHOCKIZLMA-UHFFFAOYSA-N (octanoic acid).

nodes.name: liraglutide
nodes.context: The GLP-1 agonists specifically discussed include semaglutide and liraglutide.

nodes.name: orforglipron
nodes.context: Next-generation oral approaches include small-molecule nonpeptide GLP-1 agonists (orforglipron, danuglipron) that do not require absorption enhancers.

nodes.name: danuglipron
nodes.context: Next-generation oral approaches include small-molecule nonpeptide GLP-1 agonists (orforglipron, danuglipron) that do not require absorption enhancers.

nodes.name: GLP-1 receptor
nodes.context: The patent describes pharmaceutical compositions combining a GLP-1 receptor agonist with sodium N-(8-(2-hydroxybenzoyl)amino)caprylate (SNAC) for oral administration.

nodes.name: GLP-1 receptor agonism
nodes.context: The patent describes pharmaceutical compositions combining a GLP-1 receptor agonist with sodium N-(8-(2-hydroxybenzoyl)amino)caprylate (SNAC) for oral administration.

nodes.name: transcellular absorption enhancement via transient gastric epithelial permeability
nodes.context: SNAC is an absorption enhancer that enables oral delivery of peptide therapeutics by transiently increasing gastric epithelial permeability.

nodes.name: Novo Nordisk
nodes.context: Assignee: Novo Nordisk AS

nodes.name: US11622996B2

attributes.title: Solid compositions comprising a GLP-1 agonist and SNAC for oral delivery

nodes.context: Patent ID: US11622996B2 ... Filing Date: May 6, 2019 ... Title: Solid compositions comprising a GLP-1 agonist and SNAC for oral delivery

nodes.name: metformin
nodes.context: the administration of GLP-1 RA (mainly liraglutide) alone or in combination with metformin has been investigated in women with obesity and PCOS

nodes.name: Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor
nodes.context: the emerging role of glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonists (GLP-1 RAs) as a therapeutic option for obese women with PCOS

nodes.name: GLP-1
nodes.context: an underlying pathophysiological link between obesity, GLP-1 kinetic alterations, and PCOS pathogenesis

nodes.name: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome
nodes.context: Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) is one of the leading causes of infertility

nodes.name: Obesity
nodes.context: Obesity is responsible for an increased risk of sub-fecundity and infertility

nodes.name: Female Infertility
nodes.context: Obesity is responsible for an increased risk of sub-fecundity and infertility

nodes.name: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
nodes.context: Based on the positive results in patients affected by obesity, with or without diabetes

nodes.name: insulin resistance
nodes.context: Several studies demonstrated significant weight loss and testosterone reduction, with mixed results relative to improvements in insulin resistance parameters and menstrual patterns

nodes.name: body mass index
nodes.context: higher body mass index (BMI) is associated with poorer fertility prognosis

nodes.name: tirzepatide
nodes.context: Semaglutide and tirzepatide are among the most promising agents.

nodes.name: gastrointestinal adverse events
nodes.context: Gastrointestinal adverse events were the most common, occurring more frequently with tirzepatide
